summary: Iteration 119: Forgot Password and Family Accounts Testing - All features verified working. Backend: 9/9 tests passed. Frontend: All key UI flows verified.

issues: Console warnings about DialogContent requiring DialogTitle for accessibility - cosmetic only, no functional impact

seed_data_creation: Test family members (TEST_*) created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly: (1) Forgot Password flow with valid email generates token and allows reset, (2) Forgot Password with non-existent email shows error message 'No account found', (3) Family Accounts page loads for licensee with existing members visible, (4) Add Family Member works for licensee, (5) Admin simulation shows Add Member button, (6) Backend admin endpoints for family members all work correctly.

forgot_password_valid_email.details: Forgot Password dialog: Email step -> Token auto-filled -> Password reset fields appear. Token is displayed in the UI.

forgot_password_invalid_email.details: Non-existent email shows toast: 'No account found with this email address. Please check and try again.' - does NOT proceed to token step.

reset_password_flow.details: Password reset with valid token works. User can login with new password after reset.

family_accounts_as_licensee.details: Rizza Miles can view Family Accounts page. Maria Miles (spouse) visible with $2,612.00 account value, $612.00 profit. 'Add Member' button visible.

add_family_member_as_licensee.details: Licensee can click 'Add Member', fill form (name, relationship, starting amount, deposit date), submit. New member appears in list with calculated account value. Toast shows 'Family member added'.

admin_simulation_add_member_visible.details: Admin can access Family Accounts page. 'Add Member' button is NOW VISIBLE (previously was hidden during admin simulation). Button opens the Add Family Member dialog.

admin_family_member_backend.details: All admin family member endpoints work: GET /admin/family/members/{user_id}, POST /admin/family/members/{user_id}, PUT /admin/family/members/{user_id}/{member_id}, DELETE /admin/family/members/{user_id}/{member_id}

ui_screenshots.login_page: Login page with 'Forgot Password?' link visible
ui_screenshots.forgot_password_dialog_step1: Reset Your Password - Email Address field
ui_screenshots.forgot_password_dialog_step2: Enter Reset Token - Token auto-filled, New Password fields
ui_screenshots.forgot_password_error: Non-existent email shows error toast in top-right
ui_screenshots.family_accounts_licensee: Rizza's Family Accounts showing Maria Miles with financial data
ui_screenshots.add_member_dialog: Add Family Member form with name, relationship, email, starting amount, deposit date fields
ui_screenshots.admin_simulation_family: Admin view of Family Accounts with Add Member button visible
